text: The contract administrator shall cause withholding from payments due to the prime contractor to ensure the payment of wages which are believed to be due and unpaid, for example, if wage underpayments or other violations are not corrected within 30 days after  written  notification  to  the  prime  contractor.    DOL  may  also  direct  the  withholding of contract payments for alleged wage underpayments. Withholding is considered to be serious and is not taken unless warranted. If withholding is deemed necessary, you will  be  notified  in  writing.    Only  the  amounts  needed  to  meet  the  contractor's  (and/or subcontractors') liability shall be withheld.
